description:
A minimal video player built with Rust and Svelte

A minimal video player built with Rust and Svelte, with support for AI-generated subtitles and a minimalist UI.
- New Features
  - Added native window controls with live maximize-state tracking and improved maximize/restore behavior across view modes, including PiP/fullscreen.
  - Enhanced fullscreen/cinematic playback with accurate borderless fullscreen sizing per monitor and restoration of prior window geometry; added smoother draggable window regions.
- Bug Fixes
  - Added a startup reveal fail-safe so the window becomes visible even if setup status stalls.
  - Improved event-listener cleanup to avoid stale maximize/resize behavior.
- Style
  - Updated windowed chrome with rounded corners/shadows and removed rounded chrome for fullscreen playback.
